Looks like this is having "tidy" and "Renovate has lost it's mind" problems:

```
@renovate renovate bot force-pushed the renovate/major-ci-vm-image branch 18 times, most recently from e0abfff to bfb8c04 
yesterday
```

I think this is a renovate bug:
Ref: https://github.com/containers/buildah/pull/5007#issuecomment-1819833536

### Renovate Ignore Notification
